.file-embed.background: rgb(23, 23, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(41, 44, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-breadcrumb-separator.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(62, 147, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(62, 147, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(62, 147, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.multi-select-pill-content.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.prompt.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: rgb(37, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(26, 73, 100, 0.66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(37, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(37, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
